# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - prepare
  - build
  - release
  - deploy

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  DEPLOY_TAG_PREFIX: "deploy"

default:
  image: alpine:3.19
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git curl jq
    - git config --global user.email "ci@example.com"
    - git config --global user.name "GitLab CI"

prepare_mr_metadata:
  stage: prepare
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail

      MR_TITLE="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-}"
      MR_DESCRIPTION="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-}"
      MR_IID="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-}"
      MR_URL="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_PROJECT_URL:-${CI_PROJECT_URL}}/-/merge_requests/${MR_IID}"

      if [ -z "$MR_TITLE" ] || [ -z "$MR_DESCRIPTION" ]; then
        if [ -n "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-}" ]; then
          API_URL="${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests/${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}"
          RESP="$(curl --silent --show-error --header "JOB-TOKEN: ${CI_JOB_TOKEN}" "$API_URL")"
          [ -z "$MR_TITLE" ] && MR_TITLE="$(echo "$RESP" | jq -r '.title // ""')"
          [ -z "$MR_DESCRIPTION" ] && MR_DESCRIPTION="$(echo "$RESP" | jq -r '.description // ""')"
        fi
      fi

      if [ -z "$MR_TITLE" ]; then
        MR_TITLE="${CI_COMMIT_TITLE}"
      fi

      if [ -z "$MR_DESCRIPTION" ]; then
        MR_DESCRIPTION="${CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}"
      fi

      MR_TITLE_SLUG="$(printf '%s' "$MR_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g; s/-\{2,\}/-/g; s/^-//; s/-$//' | cut -c1-40)"
      DEPLOY_TAG="${DEPLOY_TAG_PREFIX}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${MR_TITLE_SLUG}"

      {
        echo "MR_TITLE<<EOF"
        echo "$MR_TITLE"
        echo "EOF"
        echo "MR_DESCRIPTION<<EOF"
        echo "$MR_DESCRIPTION"
        echo "EOF"
        echo "MR_URL=$MR_URL"
        echo "MR_IID=$MR_IID"
        echo "MR_TITLE_SLUG=$MR_TITLE_SLUG"
        echo "DEPLOY_TAG=$DEPLOY_TAG"
      } > mr.env

      {
        echo "# Release Notes"
        echo
        echo "## Merge Request"
        echo "- Title: $MR_TITLE"
        echo "- IID: ${MR_IID:-N/A}"
        echo "- URL: $MR_URL"
        echo
        echo "## Description"
        echo "$MR_DESCRIPTION"
      } > release_notes.md
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: mr.env
    paths:
      - release_notes.md

build_app:
  stage: build
  needs:
    - job: prepare_mr_metadata
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail
      echo "Building feature from MR: $MR_TITLE"
      echo "Description:"
      printf '%s\n' "$MR_DESCRIPTION"
      echo "Build notification payload:"
      jq -n \
        --arg project "$CI_PROJECT_PATH" \
        --arg pipeline "$CI_PIPELINE_URL" \
        --arg commit "$CI_COMMIT_SHA" \
        --arg mr_title "$MR_TITLE" \
        --arg mr_description "$MR_DESCRIPTION" \
        --arg mr_url "$MR_URL" \
        --arg deploy_tag "$DEPLOY_TAG" \
        '{
          project: $project,
          pipeline: $pipeline,
          commit: $commit,
          merge_request: {
            title: $mr_title,
            description: $mr_description,
            url: $mr_url
          },
          deploy_tag: $deploy_tag,
          message: ("Build started for MR: " + $mr_title)
        }' > build_notification.json
      cat build_notification.json
      mkdir -p dist
      printf 'artifact for %s\n' "$MR_TITLE" > dist/build.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - dist/
      - build_notification.json

generate_release_commit:
  stage: release
  needs:
    - job: prepare_mr_metadata
      artifacts: true
    - job: build_app
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail
      mkdir -p .release
      cp release_notes.md .release/RELEASE_NOTES.md

      git checkout "$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME"
      git pull origin "$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME" || true

      cp .release/RELEASE_NOTES.md RELEASE_NOTES.md
      git add RELEASE_NOTES.md

      if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then
        git commit -m "chore(release): ${MR_TITLE} [skip ci]" -m "$MR_DESCRIPTION"
        git push "https://gitlab-ci-token:${CI_JOB_TOKEN}@${CI_SERVER_HOST}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.git" HEAD:"$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME"
      else
        echo "No release notes changes to commit"
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'

create_deploy_tag:
  stage: deploy
  needs:
    - job: prepare_mr_metadata
      artifacts: true
    - job: generate_release_commit
      optional: true
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail
      git fetch --tags
      if git rev-parse "$DEPLOY_TAG" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo "Tag already exists: $DEPLOY_TAG"
      else
        git tag -a "$DEPLOY_TAG" -m "Deploy: $MR_TITLE" -m "$MR_DESCRIPTION"
        git push "https://gitlab-ci-token:${CI_JOB_TOKEN}@${CI_SERVER_HOST}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.git" "$DEPLOY_TAG"
      fi

      jq -n \
        --arg project "$CI_PROJECT_PATH" \
        --arg environment "${CI_ENVIRONMENT_NAME:-production}" \
        --arg tag "$DEPLOY_TAG" \
        --arg mr_title "$MR_TITLE" \
        --arg mr_description "$MR_DESCRIPTION" \
        --arg mr_url "$MR_URL" \
        '{
          project: $project,
          environment: $environment,
          deployment_tag: $tag,
          merge_request: {
            title: $mr_title,
            description: $mr_description,
            url: $mr_url
          },
          message: ("Deploying " + $tag + " for MR: " + $mr_title)
        }' > deploy_notification.json

      cat deploy_notification.json
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - deploy_notification.json
  environment:
    name: production
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'
